description: The Notes module: folders, favorites, tree, block editor, creating/editing note content, or using note tools.
detection_hint: note, notes module, folder, favorite, star, sidebar, tree, breadcrumb, block editor, create note, edit note, append, read note, list notes

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Notes: block editor; markdown in tools is converted to real blocks (like paste). Prefer surgical edits: get_note → replace_block / insert_blocks / append_to_note (blocks or markdown text). Use read_note_lines / replace_note_lines / insert_note_lines for line-based edits on the markdown projection. list_notes / search_notes / get_recent_notes for discovery (search: comma-separated keywords; search_notes match_all for AND; fuzzy typo-tolerance on by default). restructure_note only for full rewrites. Tool results are JSON: ok, code, message, data.
